macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: IMF, World Bank, and IEA Issue Joint Warning on Energy Crisis
items.summary: The IMF, World Bank, and IEA warned governments against worsening the biggest energy disruption in modern history through fuel hoarding or trade restrictions, as oil prices surge and impact natural gas, fertilizers, and shipping costs. Growth forecasts are being cut amid rising inflation risks.

items.title: SF Fed: Volatile Oil Markets Cloud Economic Outlook with Surging Inflation
items.summary: Oil prices remain high and volatile due to Middle East conflict, pushing CPI inflation to 3.3% in March from 2.4% in February, while core inflation holds at 2.6%. Energy cost rises affect fertilizers, aluminum, and plastics, with uncertain duration of disruptions.
items.source: Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco

items.title: IMF Hosts Debate on Navigating Shock-Prone Global Economy
items.summary: The IMF discussed how policymakers can manage a more shock-prone environment to achieve macroeconomic and financial stability amid ongoing global challenges.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Surges 36.64% to $15.10 Amid Stable Market
items.summary: RaveDAO's RAVE token rose nearly 36.64% in the past 24 hours to $15.10, following a recent drop from its all-time high, while the broader crypto market remained stable. This movement contributed to overall market optimism alongside a US crypto bill advancement.

items.title: Siren (SIREN) Doubles in Value with 112% Gain to $1.69
items.summary: Siren token posted a 112% surge in 24 hours, climbing from $0.78 to $1.69 and reaching a $1.2B market cap, ranking it #64 among top cryptocurrencies. On-chain data highlights significant volume surge driving the rally.

items.title: Bitcoin Rally Stalls Near $76K as 60,000 BTC from Long-Term Holders Hits Exchanges
items.summary: Bitcoin surged toward $76,000 but faced resistance and stalled, with 60,000 BTC from long-term holders (STHs) flowing into exchanges during the rally. Earlier rebounds failed below $75,000-$76,000 amid broader market pressures.

items.title: Rhea Finance Suffers $7.6 Million Exploit via Fake Token Manipulation
items.summary: Rhea Finance was hit by a major $7.6 million exploit where attackers manipulated liquidity pools using fake tokens, exposing security vulnerabilities in DeFi projects. Hyperbridge also faced a multi-million dollar exploit.

items.title: BNB Burns Over $1 Billion in Tokens to Reduce Supply
items.summary: BNB Chain burned more than $1 billion worth of tokens, aiming to cut circulating supply to 100 million over six years, which could support price recovery toward $700. This deflationary measure boosts long-term scarcity.

items.title: XRP ETF Sees Over $21 Million Inflows in April Amid Strong Demand
items.summary: XRP ETFs recorded inflows surpassing $21 million in April, driven by institutional demand despite market volatility. Additional developments include Rakuten enabling XRP conversions for 100M Japanese users and Korean insurers tokenizing bonds with Ripple.

items.title: Poland Crypto Exchange CEO Disappears, Triggering Withdrawal Crisis
items.summary: The CEO of a Poland-based cryptocurrency exchange vanished, causing a massive withdrawal crisis, large Bitcoin losses, and panic among users rushing to pull funds. This incident highlights ongoing risks in centralized exchanges.

items.title: World Liberty Financial (WLFI) Token Unlock Proposal Sparks Investor Backlash
items.summary: WLFI faces investor concerns and backlash over a proposed token unlock plan, raising issues about fairness, transparency, and control in the project. This development adds to market caution around governance.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Arrowhead Fixes Helldivers 2 Super Earth Error and Addresses Nerfs
items.summary: Arrowhead Game Studios resolved a Super Earth error in Helldivers 2, updated known issues, and players discovered nerfs to FRV and Sentry Stratagems. Sony also filed a patent for a new PlayStation controller concept.

items.title: Diablo 4 Announces Biggest Live Stream in History with Free DLC
items.summary: Blizzard is hosting the largest live stream ever for Diablo 4, featuring exciting trailers and details on free DLC content.

items.title: Tim Breaks Down Major Video Game News of 2026 So Far
items.summary: Coverage includes Pokemon issues, Nintendo Switch 2 boost mode rumors, leaks and bans, Blue Point Studio shutdown, Sony thoughts, hi-res Portal, and Xbox leadership concerns.

items.title: Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss Developer Faces Insolvency
items.summary: The studio behind Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss has filed for insolvency and placed some studios into receivership amid financial troubles.

items.title: Fall Guys Subject of 'Death of a Game' Analysis
items.summary: A new episode examines the decline of Fall Guys, exploring reasons for its player exodus and failure to recover.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
